general.name: mos_target_gaia_dr3_vari_rrlyrae
general.description: The Gaia DR3 catalogue of RR Lyrae stars. For more details, refer to https://gea.esac.esa.int/archive/documentation/GDR3/Gaia_archive/chap_datamodel/sec_dm_variability_tables/ssec_dm_vari_rrlyrae.html.
general.naming_convention: $MOS_TARGET/[V_TARG]/[FTYPE]/mos_gaia_dr3_vari_rrlyrae.[FTYPE] with FTYPE='fits' and V_TARG='2.0.0' for DR20.

changelog.description: Describes changes to the datamodel product and/or file structure from one release to another

pf.name: pf
pf.description: Period corresponding to the fundamental pulsation mode in the G band time series

p1_o.name: p1_o
p1_o.description: Period corresponding to the first overtone pulsation mode in the G band time series

epoch_g.name: epoch_g
epoch_g.description: Epoch of the maximum of the light curve in the G band

epoch_g_error.name: epoch_g_error
epoch_g_error.description: Uncertainty on the epoch parameter epoch_g

epoch_bp.name: epoch_bp
epoch_bp.description: Epoch of the maximum of the light curve in the BP band

epoch_bp_error.name: epoch_bp_error
epoch_bp_error.description: Uncertainty on the epoch parameter epoch_bp

epoch_rp.name: epoch_rp
epoch_rp.description: Epoch of the maximum of the light curve in the RP band

epoch_rp_error.name: epoch_rp_error
epoch_rp_error.description: Uncertainty on the epoch parameter epoch_rp

epoch_rv.name: epoch_rv
epoch_rv.description: Epoch of the minimum of the radial velocity curve

epoch_rv_error.name: epoch_rv_error
epoch_rv_error.description: Uncertainty on the epoch parameter epoch_rv

int_average_g.name: int_average_g
int_average_g.description: Intensity-averaged magnitude in the G band

int_average_bp.name: int_average_bp
int_average_bp.description: Intensity-averaged magnitude in the BP band

int_average_rp.name: int_average_rp
int_average_rp.description: Intensity-averaged magnitude in the RP band

peak_to_peak_g.name: peak_to_peak_g
peak_to_peak_g.description: Peak-to-peak amplitude of the G band light curve

peak_to_peak_bp.name: peak_to_peak_bp
peak_to_peak_bp.description: Peak-to-peak amplitude of the BP band light curve

peak_to_peak_rp.name: peak_to_peak_rp
peak_to_peak_rp.description: Peak-to-peak amplitude of the RP band light curve

peak_to_peak_rv.name: peak_to_peak_rv
peak_to_peak_rv.description: Peak-to-peak amplitude of the radial velocity curve

metallicity.name: metallicity
metallicity.description: Metallicity of the star from the Fourier parameters of the light curve

r21_g.name: r21_g
r21_g.description: Fourier decomposition parameter r21_g: A2/A1 (for G band)

r21_g_error.name: r21_g_error
r21_g_error.description: Uncertainty on the r21_g parameter: A2/A1 (for G band)

r31_g.name: r31_g
r31_g.description: Fourier decomposition parameter r31_g: A3/A1 (for G band)

r31_g_error.name: r31_g_error
r31_g_error.description: Uncertainty on the r31_g parameter: A3/A1 (for G band)

phi21_g.name: phi21_g
phi21_g.description: Fourier decomposition parameter phi21_g: phi2 - 2*phi1 (for G band)

phi21_g_error.name: phi21_g_error
phi21_g_error.description: Uncertainty on the phi21_g parameter: phi2 - 2*phi1 (for G band)

phi31_g.name: phi31_g
phi31_g.description: Fourier decomposition parameter phi31_g: phi3 - 3*phi1 (for G band)

phi31_g_error.name: phi31_g_error
phi31_g_error.description: Uncertainty on the phi31_g parameter: phi3 - 3*phi1 (for G band)

num_clean_epochs_g.name: num_clean_epochs_g
num_clean_epochs_g.description: Number of G FoV epochs used in the fitting algorithm

num_clean_epochs_bp.name: num_clean_epochs_bp
num_clean_epochs_bp.description: Number of BP epochs used in the fitting algorithm

num_clean_epochs_rp.name: num_clean_epochs_rp
num_clean_epochs_rp.description: Number of RP epochs used in the fitting algorithm

num_clean_epochs_rv.name: num_clean_epochs_rv
num_clean_epochs_rv.description: Number of radial velocity epochs used in the fitting algorithm

zp_mag_g.name: zp_mag_g
zp_mag_g.description: Zero point (mag) of the final model of the G band light curve

zp_mag_bp.name: zp_mag_bp
zp_mag_bp.description: Zero point (mag) of the final model of the BP band light curve

zp_mag_rp.name: zp_mag_rp
zp_mag_rp.description: Zero point (mag) of the final model of the RP band light curve

num_harmonics_for_p1_g.name: num_harmonics_for_p1_g
num_harmonics_for_p1_g.description: Number of harmonics used to model the first periodicity of the G-band light curve

num_harmonics_for_p1_bp.name: num_harmonics_for_p1_bp
num_harmonics_for_p1_bp.description: Number of harmonics used to model the first periodicity of the BP-band light curve

num_harmonics_for_p1_rp.name: num_harmonics_for_p1_rp
num_harmonics_for_p1_rp.description: Number of harmonics used to model the first periodicity of the RP-band light curve

num_harmonics_for_p1_rv.name: num_harmonics_for_p1_rv
num_harmonics_for_p1_rv.description: Number of harmonics used to model the first periodicity of the radial velocity curve

reference_time_g.name: reference_time_g
reference_time_g.description: Reference time of the Fourier modelled G-band light curve

reference_time_bp.name: reference_time_bp
reference_time_bp.description: Reference time of the Fourier modelled BP-band light curve

reference_time_rp.name: reference_time_rp
reference_time_rp.description: Reference time of the Fourier modelled RP-band light curve

reference_time_rv.name: reference_time_rv
reference_time_rv.description: Reference time of the Fourier modelled radial velocity curve

fund_freq1.name: fund_freq1
fund_freq1.description: First frequency of the non-linear Fourier modelling

fund_freq1_error.name: fund_freq1_error
fund_freq1_error.description: Error of the first frequency of the non-linear Fourier modelling

fund_freq2.name: fund_freq2
fund_freq2.description: Second frequency of the non-linear Fourier modelling in the G band

fund_freq2_error.name: fund_freq2_error
fund_freq2_error.description: Error of the second frequency of the non-linear Fourier modelling in the G band

fund_freq1_harmonic_ampl_g.name: fund_freq1_harmonic_ampl_g
fund_freq1_harmonic_ampl_g.description: Amplitudes of the Fourier model for the first frequency in the G band

fund_freq1_harmonic_ampl_g_error.name: fund_freq1_harmonic_ampl_g_error
fund_freq1_harmonic_ampl_g_error.description: Errors of the amplitudes of the Fourier model for the first frequency in the G band

fund_freq1_harmonic_phase_g.name: fund_freq1_harmonic_phase_g
fund_freq1_harmonic_phase_g.description: Phases of the Fourier model for the first frequency in the G band

fund_freq1_harmonic_phase_g_error.name: fund_freq1_harmonic_phase_g_error
fund_freq1_harmonic_phase_g_error.description: Errors of the phases of the Fourier model for the first frequency in the G band

fund_freq1_harmonic_ampl_bp.name: fund_freq1_harmonic_ampl_bp
fund_freq1_harmonic_ampl_bp.description: Amplitudes of the Fourier model for the first frequency in the BP band

fund_freq1_harmonic_ampl_bp_error.name: fund_freq1_harmonic_ampl_bp_error
fund_freq1_harmonic_ampl_bp_error.description: Errors of the amplitudes of the Fourier model for the first frequency in the BP band

fund_freq1_harmonic_phase_bp.name: fund_freq1_harmonic_phase_bp
fund_freq1_harmonic_phase_bp.description: Phases of the Fourier model for the first frequency in the BP band

fund_freq1_harmonic_phase_bp_error.name: fund_freq1_harmonic_phase_bp_error
fund_freq1_harmonic_phase_bp_error.description: Errors of the phases of the Fourier model for the first frequency in the BP band

fund_freq1_harmonic_ampl_rp.name: fund_freq1_harmonic_ampl_rp
fund_freq1_harmonic_ampl_rp.description: Amplitudes of the Fourier model for the first frequency in the RP band

fund_freq1_harmonic_ampl_rp_error.name: fund_freq1_harmonic_ampl_rp_error
fund_freq1_harmonic_ampl_rp_error.description: Errors of the amplitudes of the Fourier model for the first frequency in the RP band

fund_freq1_harmonic_phase_rp.name: fund_freq1_harmonic_phase_rp
fund_freq1_harmonic_phase_rp.description: Phases of the Fourier model for the first frequency in the RP band

fund_freq1_harmonic_phase_rp_error.name: fund_freq1_harmonic_phase_rp_error
fund_freq1_harmonic_phase_rp_error.description: Errors of the phases of the Fourier model for the first frequency in the RP band

fund_freq1_harmonic_ampl_rv.name: fund_freq1_harmonic_ampl_rv
fund_freq1_harmonic_ampl_rv.description: Amplitudes of the Fourier model for the first frequency of the radial velocity curve

fund_freq1_harmonic_ampl_rv_error.name: fund_freq1_harmonic_ampl_rv_error
fund_freq1_harmonic_ampl_rv_error.description: Errors of the amplitudes of the Fourier model for the first frequency of the radial velocity curve

fund_freq1_harmonic_phase_rv.name: fund_freq1_harmonic_phase_rv
fund_freq1_harmonic_phase_rv.description: Phases of the Fourier model for the first frequency of the radial velocity curve

fund_freq1_harmonic_phase_rv_error.name: fund_freq1_harmonic_phase_rv_error
fund_freq1_harmonic_phase_rv_error.description: Errors of the phases of the Fourier model for the first frequency of the radial velocity curve

best_classification.name: best_classification
best_classification.description: Best RR Lyrae classification estimate out of: 'RRc', 'RRab', 'RRd'

g_absorption_error.name: g_absorption_error
g_absorption_error.description: Error on the interstellar absorption in the G-band
